bugs.title: Companion mode fullContent duplicates pre-tool text
bugs.description: When the AI generates text before a tool call in companion mode, and the tool rejects the call (returning 'not_needed'), the AI regenerates similar text. The fullContent field concatenates both the pre-tool and post-tool text, resulting in duplicate content. In this test, the greeting 'Bienvenida a Barcelona...' appeared twice in fullContent.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Send a message in CHAT_MODE_COMPANION asking 'What should I do this afternoon?'. 2. The AI generates intro text, calls create_itinerary_items, which returns status=not_needed. 3. AI generates new response text. 4. fullContent contains both the pre-tool text and the post-tool text.
bugs.expected: fullContent should contain only the final response text, not the pre-tool draft
bugs.actual: fullContent contains duplicated greeting text from both before and after the tool rejection

bugs.title: AI called create_itinerary_items in companion mode for informational query
bugs.description: When asked 'What should I do this afternoon?' in companion mode, the AI called create_itinerary_items to add items to the itinerary. The tool correctly rejected this with a 'not_needed' status, but the AI should not have attempted the tool call for an informational question in companion mode. The persona says companion mode should only fire create_itinerary_items on explicit 'add to my plan' requests.
bugs.expected: AI answers the informational question directly without calling create_itinerary_items
bugs.actual: AI called create_itinerary_items which was rejected with 'not_needed' status

ux_issues.description: Restaurant recommendation response in planning mode had a confusing ending. After recommending Can Majo and Arrosseria Xativa with full details, the AI appended a second paragraph saying 'I already added these in the previous turn' which was inaccurate - this was the first time these were mentioned. The AI created the items in the SAME turn but the fullContent made it sound like they were from a prior conversation.
ux_issues.suggestion: The AI's tool-loop continuation message should say 'I just added these to your itinerary' not 'I already added these in the previous turn'

ai_behavior_issues.issue: AI corrected arrival date from June 15 to June 16 based on flight timing, which is helpful but changes the user's stated 5-day framework. The flight arrives June 16 at 8:55 AM, and the hotel check-in date is June 15, creating a slight mismatch the AI tried to resolve.
ai_behavior_issues.context: When building the 5-day itinerary, the AI noted the flight arrives June 16 despite check-in being June 15. This is actually good contextual reasoning, but could confuse a user who considers June 15 as day 1.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Booking ingestion and retrieval were excellent - all three bookings parsed correctly with accurate field extraction. The AI accurately answered specific booking questions (terminal, check-in time, tour date) from context. The recommend_booking tool fired correctly for day trips with proper FTC disclosure, and correctly did NOT fire for restaurant suggestions. The 5-day itinerary was comprehensive (23 items across 5 days) and respected the stated preference against alcohol. Companion mode responses were practical and concise. The main issues are minor: duplicate text in fullContent when a tool call is rejected in companion mode, and the AI unnecessarily attempting create_itinerary_items for informational companion queries.
